meta.source: Official FIFA Hospitality venue landing pages
notes: This dataset is scraped from the public venue landing pages under /venues/{slug}.
It captures copy, CTA labels and hrefs, key section images, and venue series match lists.
Text is normalized to plain strings for direct consumption in the app.

seo.title: Mexico City | FIFA World Cup 2026 Hospitality from On Location
seo.description: On Location is the official Hospitality Provider of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in Mexico City, featuring premium seats, cuisine, and more!

hero.eyebrow: YOUR JOURNEY TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ STARTS HERE
hero.title: Mexico City
hero.description: Football plays a very important role in the city’s tradition and is the most practiced sport among its citizens. A true coliseum of world football and the first to host a third FIFA World Cup™, Mexico City Stadium is home to Club América of Liga MX as well as the Mexico national football team. It hosted two FIFA World Cup™ Finals, showcasing the likes of Pelé and Diego Maradona across two thrilling finales in 1970 and ‘86, respectively. It’s the largest stadium in Latin America. It will host five matches at FIFA World Cup 2026™, including the tournament’s opening match (featuring the Mexico national team).

singleMatches.title: Select Single Matches
singleMatches.copy: See the beautiful game on its grand stage at the match of your choice in Mexico City, Mexico.
singleMatches.hospitalityCopy: Hospitality options include: Pitchside Lounge; VIP; Trophy Lounge; Champions Club; and FIFA Pavilion.

venueSeries.title: Mexico City Venue Series
venueSeries.intro: Watch every match in Mexico City.
seriesIncludes: One (1) match in the Round of 32
One (1) match in the Round of 16

privateSuites.title: Private Suites
privateSuites.copy: Level up with this exclusive offering that includes preferred entry, direct seating access, and dedicated service – all to be enjoyed privately among you and your guests.

seo.title: Guadalajara | FIFA World Cup 2026 Hospitality from On Location
seo.description: On Location is the official Hospitality Provider of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in Guadalajara, featuring premium seats, cuisine, and more!

hero.eyebrow: YOUR JOURNEY TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ STARTS HERE
hero.title: Guadalajara
hero.description: The City of Guadalajara was a Host City for the 1970 and 1986 FIFA World Cup™ Finals, a football venue during the Mexico 1968 Olympic Games and has hosted the 2011 Pan American Games. Built on raised ground with a spherical design, Guadalajara Stadium is an eye-catching venue that is home to Liga MX club C.D. Guadalajara. It hosted the 2011 Pan-American Games and was one of the main venues for the FIFA U-17 World Cup Mexico 2011™. It will host four matches at FIFA World Cup 2026™, including a Mexico national team match in the Group Stage.

seo.title: Monterrey | FIFA World Cup 2026 Hospitality from On Location
seo.description: On Location is the official Hospitality Provider of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in Monterrey, featuring premium seats, cuisine, and more!

hero.eyebrow: YOUR JOURNEY TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ STARTS HERE
hero.title: Monterrey
hero.description: Football is part of the culture of the people of Monterrey, and home to two of the most relevant teams and fan bases in Mexico. In 1945, Monterrey’s first professional football team was established as C.F. Monterrey. A modern-day marvel equipped with compact energy solutions and low-voltage equipment, it is the home of C.F. Monterrey throughout the Liga MX season. It hosted eight matches at the 2022 Concacaf W Championship. It will host four matches at FIFA World Cup 2026™, including a Round-of-32 match.

singleMatches.copy: See the beautiful game on its grand stage at the match of your choice in a city bringing people together through football, Monterrey, Nuevo Leon.

seo.title: Toronto | FIFA World Cup 2026 Hospitality from On Location
seo.description: On Location is the official Hospitality Provider of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in Toronto, featuring premium seats, cuisine, and more!

hero.eyebrow: YOUR JOURNEY TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ STARTS HERE
hero.title: Toronto
hero.description: As Canada’s largest city, it is a globally renowned destination for its culinary scene, nightlife, extensive green spaces, music, film and cultural festivals, and major sporting events. Known as “Canada’s National Soccer Stadium” and home to MLS club Toronto FC, along with the Canadian Football League's (CFL) Toronto Argonauts, the stadium was purpose-built to host the FIFA U-20 World Cup Canada 2007™. It will host six matches at FIFA World Cup 2026™, including the Canadian national team’s opening match.

seo.title: Vancouver | FIFA World Cup 2026 Hospitality from On Location
seo.description: On Location is the official Hospitality Provider of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in Vancouver, featuring premium seats, cuisine, and more!

hero.eyebrow: YOUR JOURNEY TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ STARTS HERE
hero.title: Vancouver
hero.description: Welcome to Vancouver, where the beautiful game meets a city that’s nestled between mountains and ocean. From Richmond to Burnaby, to the North Shore, we are the Pacific coast. Located in the heart of the city’s business and entertainment district, BC Place Vancouver is the region’s premier event destination. It hosted the FIFA Women's World Cup Canada 2015™ and is home to both Vancouver Whitecaps FC (MLS) and the BC Lions (CFL). It will host seven matches at FIFA World Cup 2026™, including two Canadian national team matches in the Group Stage.

seo.title: Atlanta | FIFA World Cup 2026 Hospitality from On Location
seo.description: On Location is the official Hospitality Provider of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in Atlanta, featuring premium seats, cuisine, and more!

hero.eyebrow: YOUR JOURNEY TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ STARTS HERE
hero.title: Atlanta
hero.description: A blossoming football city, Atlanta is considered by many as the capital of culture, commerce, transportation, education, and sport in the American South. Home to the NFL's Atlanta Falcons and MLS’ Atlanta United FC, the Atlanta Stadium has welcomed major events like the Super Bowl and MLS Cup. It is lauded as the most sustainable stadium in the world. It will host eight matches at FIFA World Cup 2026™, including a Semi-Final match.

seo.title: Boston | FIFA World Cup 2026 Hospitality from On Location
seo.description: On Location is the official Hospitality Provider of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in Boston, featuring premium seats, cuisine, and more!

hero.eyebrow: YOUR JOURNEY TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ STARTS HERE
hero.title: Boston
hero.description: Boston is a showcase city where people from all over the world come together to live, work, and play. It is a city where everyone brings their own values and traditions to continually refine what it means to be a Bostonian. Boston Stadium is home to MLS' New England Revolution and the NFL's New England Patriots. It has hosted numerous major sporting events, including the Super Bowl, MLS Cup, and FIFA Women’s World Cup USA 2003™. It will host seven matches at FIFA World Cup 2026™, including a Quarter-Final match.

seo.title: Dallas | FIFA World Cup 2026 Hospitality from On Location
seo.description: On Location is the official Hospitality Provider of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in Dallas, featuring premium seats, cuisine, and more!

hero.eyebrow: YOUR JOURNEY TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ STARTS HERE
hero.title: Dallas
hero.description: With an impressively large youth football system, an incredible stadium, and experience hosting Super Bowls and numerous men’s and women’s national team matches over the past few years, Dallas is prepared for the FIFA World Cup™. Dallas Stadium, a jaw-dropping example of architecture, is the home of the NFL’s Dallas Cowboys. It has hosted a variety of major events, such as the NCAA Men's Final Four and the 2024 Concacaf Nations League Finals. It will host nine matches at FIFA World Cup 2026™, including a Semi-Final match.

seo.title: Houston | FIFA World Cup 2026 Hospitality from On Location
seo.description: On Location is the official Hospitality Provider of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in Houston, featuring premium seats, cuisine, and more!

hero.eyebrow: YOUR JOURNEY TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ STARTS HERE
hero.title: Houston
hero.description: As one of the most diverse destinations in America, the city will utilize the power of the FIFA World Cup™ to bring communities together to showcase the city to the world. Home of the NFL’s Houston Texans, Houston Stadium was the first NFL venue to feature a retractable roof. It has hosted the MLS All-Star Game, national team fixtures of both the U.S. and Mexico, and three matches at the Copa América Centenario in 2016. It will host seven matches at FIFA World Cup 2026™, including a Round-of-16 match.

seo.title: Kansas City | FIFA World Cup 2026 Hospitality from On Location
seo.description: On Location is the official Hospitality Provider of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in Kansas City, featuring premium seats, cuisine, and more!

hero.eyebrow: YOUR JOURNEY TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ STARTS HERE
hero.title: Kansas City
hero.description: Kansas City has a diverse cross section of American history, taking its roots from the western frontier as the starting point for the Oregon, California, and Santa Fe trails. Known as one of the soccer capitals of the U.S., Kansas City is home to two-time MLS champions Sporting KC as well as the KC Current of the National Women's Soccer League (NWSL). The venue is also home to the NFL’s Kansas City Chiefs and holds the Guinness World Record for the loudest crowd roar at an outdoor stadium. It will host six matches at FIFA World Cup 2026™, including a Quarter-Final match.

seo.title: Los Angeles | FIFA World Cup 2026 Hospitality from On Location
seo.description: On Location is the official Hospitality Provider of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in Los Angeles, featuring premium seats, cuisine, and more!

hero.eyebrow: YOUR JOURNEY TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ STARTS HERE
hero.title: Los Angeles
hero.description: The FIFA World Cup 26™ in Los Angeles will deliver one of the most diverse cities in America to support the promotion of human rights, environmental sustainability and the game of football. This state-of-the-art facility opened in 2020 and has already hosted a range of major events, including the Super Bowl. It recently hosted the 2025 Concacaf Nations League Finals. It is home to two NFL teams: the Rams and the Chargers. The city of Los Angeles hosted the 1994 FIFA World Cup™ Final. It will host eight matches at FIFA World Cup 2026™, including the U.S. national team’s opening match as well as a Quarter-Final match.

seo.title: New York New Jersey | FIFA World Cup 2026 Hospitality from On Location
seo.description: On Location is the official Hospitality Provider of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in New York New Jersey, featuring premium seats, cuisine, and more!

hero.eyebrow: YOUR JOURNEY TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ STARTS HERE
hero.title: New York New Jersey
hero.description: With hundreds of thousands of youth players in the region, New York and New Jersey grew the game from a grassroots level tremendously after hosting the 1994 FIFA World Cup USA™ and expects to do the same after 2026. A multipurpose stadium that opened in 2010, it serves as the home of two NFL teams: the Giants and the Jets. The city hosted a Semi-Final match at the 1994 FIFA World Cup™, and, most recently, New York New Jersey Stadium hosted a handful of FIFA Club World Cup 25™ matches, including the Final. It will host eight matches at FIFA World Cup 2026™, including the Final.

singleMatches.title: Select Single Matches
singleMatches.copy: New York and New Jersey are ready to grow the game once again. See the beautiful game on its grand stage at the match of your choice in New York New Jersey Stadium.

seo.title: Philadelphia | FIFA World Cup 2026 Hospitality from On Location
seo.description: On Location is the official Hospitality Provider of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in Philadelphia, featuring premium seats, cuisine, and more!

hero.eyebrow: YOUR JOURNEY TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ STARTS HERE
hero.title: Philadelphia
hero.description: Philadelphia enjoys a football history that dates to the 19th century, and it was home to one of the earliest professional franchises in the nation; Phillies of the American League of Professional Football. Philadelphia Stadium is the home of the NFL's Philadelphia Eagles. It opened in 2003 with a blockbuster match between Manchester United and Barcelona. In the years since, the stadium has hosted U.S. National Team matches and major events, like the 2015 Gold Cup Final. It will host six matches at FIFA World Cup 2026™, including a Round-of-16 match.

hero.eyebrow: YOUR JOURNEY TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ STARTS HERE
hero.title: San Francisco Bay Area
hero.description: The San Francisco Bay Area encompasses the metropolitan areas of San Francisco, Oakland and San Jose and is the cultural and financial hub of Northern California. Home to the NFL's San Francisco 49ers, this open-air stadium located in the Silicon Valley was recently renovated. It has hosted a variety of major events, including the Super Bowl, College Football Playoff National Championship, and the 2016 Copa América Centenario. It will host six matches at FIFA World Cup 2026™, including a Round-of-32 match.

hero.eyebrow: YOUR JOURNEY TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ STARTS HERE
hero.title: Seattle
hero.description: Seattle is one of the healthiest and greenest cities in the nation and it is eager to stage an environmentally friendly event. Seattle Stadium is home to MLS’ Seattle Sounders and the NFL’s Seattle Seahawks. Located just blocks from the Puget Sound waterway, the stadium boasts a unique design with an open north end that provides a stunning view of the downtown skyline. It has twice held the Guinness World Record for the loudest crowd roar at an outdoor stadium. It will host six matches at FIFA World Cup 2026™, including a U.S. national team match in the Group Stage.
